## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior this PR changes (`composer test`)
- [ ] Static analysis passes (`composer analyse`)
- [ ] Code style fixed (`composer format`)
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes public behavior (README, config, or an ADR under `docs/adr`)
